goal: Audit and report all issues found in the project
summary: Phase 1 complete. Produced 4 audit reports covering code quality (31 issues), security (3 issues including exposed API keys), performance/architecture (bundle size, images, memoization), and a synthesized master report with 50 prioritized issues and actionable recommendations. All reports verified against real project state.
stepSummaries:
1. Run ESLint, TypeScript build, and bundle analysis to quantify issues [verified]
  2. Write code quality audit report (ESLint errors, console logs, TS issues, dead code, large files) [verified]
  3. Write security audit report (exposed secrets, client-side keys, auth patterns) [verified]
  4. Write performance and architecture audit report (bundle size, images, lazy loading, duplicates, prop drilling) [verified]
  5. Synthesize all findings into master report with prioritized recommendations [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Steps 1,3,4 used real test verification (tsc, lint, build, file reads). Step 2 subagent cross-referenced lint output against report. Step 5 subagent read all 3 category reports and synthesized content. Only Step 5's formal verify command was proxy (file existence + grep), but the subagent performed real semantic validation.
gateVerdicts.rationale: The verification trail is solid: Steps 1,3,4 had test-class verifications. Steps 2,5 had subagents that performed real content validation during execution. The load-bearing logic was exercised.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Phase goal: 'Audit and report all issues found in the project'. Output: 4 report files at .kimchi/docs/ — audit-code-quality.md (31 lint issues), audit-security.md (3 issues with key rotation steps), audit-perf-arch.md (bundle and architecture findings), project-audit-report.md (synthesized master with 50 issues and prioritized recommendations).
gateVerdicts.rationale: All four reports exist and contain concrete, actionable findings across all requested categories. The master report ties them together with severity ratings and remediation steps.

gateVerdicts.evidence: No deferred items. All 5 planned steps completed successfully. The audit was purely read-only as required.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing was left undone. Every planned deliverable (lint/build analysis, 3 category reports, master synthesis) was produced and verified.
